title: Ubiquiti UACC-AOC-SFP10-5M, AOC cable, 10 Gbps, 5m
category: Ubiquiti / Optical networks / DAC and AOC cables / AOC cables
description: The active Multi Mode optical cable is used for direct connection of two SFP+ ports with a link speed of 10 Gbps . This ultra-thin (3mm) optical cable is 5 m long but is also available in other variants. The cable is ideal for creating connections between switches or routers that provide 10 Gbps
